review.comment:
I cannot recommend Dr. Maro Oganesyan enough. From the moment I walked into her office, I felt welcomed and cared for. What impressed me most was her honesty and professionalism.
Before seeing Dr. Oganesyan, I visited another dentist who told me I had serious gum disease, that I could lose bone, and even risk losing my teeth. Naturally, I was extremely stressed and worried. When I came to Dr. Oganesyan for a second opinion, she took the time to carefully examine everything and explain my situation in a clear and reassuring way.
Instead of trying to scare me, she was honest and straightforward. She explained that my teeth and gums were actually in good condition overall and that I only had one issue that needed attention—and it was not nearly as serious as I had been led to believe. Her knowledge, integrity, and genuine care immediately put me at ease.
It is rare to find a dentist who is both highly skilled and truly honest. Dr. Oganesyan made me feel comfortable, informed, and confident about my dental health. I left her office feeling relieved, satisfied, and grateful that I found someone I can trust.
If you are looking for a dentist who genuinely cares about her patients and provides honest recommendations, I highly recommend Dr. Maro Oganesyan.

review.comment:
After moving to Santa Monica from Newport Beach, it took me a long time to find a local dentist I felt comfortable with. Because Clove Dental is right up the block in my neighborhood, I hoped they would become my long-term practice. I already had my implants done previously, so I just needed the crowns, a cleaning, and whitening. I didn't blink at the premium pricing—I paid cash out of pocket in full and even signed up for their membership program.

While the clinical staff is wonderful, the operational management and lack of professionalism from one of the owners, Dr. Jovhan Jilbert, ruined the experience.

When they wanted my business, everything was handled promptly. The moment they were paid in full, the standard dropped. First, I arrived for my tooth delivery appointment only to discover Dr. Jilbert had gone on vacation without giving me advance notice or a phone call to reschedule.

Today was the final straw. I had an 8:00 AM appointment for a check-up and to finish my teeth whitening. Right at 8:00 AM, I was told he was running 5 to 10 minutes late and was put in the chair to watch videos. Nearly an hour later, I was still sitting there with no sign of him. Stalling a patient just to keep them in the chair is completely unacceptable. Because of this, my whitening never got completed, and I wasn't able to ask my follow-up questions. While the crowns feel okay right now, I am not a dentist—I now have to go to a new practice to finish the work I already paid for and find out if the crowns were even placed correctly.

As a fellow business owner, my advice is simple: if you charge top dollar, you must deliver top-dollar service and transparent communication. High-end clinics strictly enforce cancellation fees when patients miss appointments without proper notice. It is only fair that the same courtesy, respect, and accountability apply to the provider. If I treated my own contracting clients with this level of scheduling disregard and misdirection, I would be out of business tomorrow. Very poor business practice.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi, 

We sincerely apologize for the delays, lack of communication, and the inconvenience this caused during your treatment.

Please reach out to our office at your convenience so we can address your concerns directly.

Clove Dental Team

I write this while I am sitting in their office - that is how furious I am!

This place was very disappointing. The first time I came in for a cleaning, they did a decent job, so I decided to move forward with Invisalign through them.

However, after I had already ordered and fully paid for the Invisalign, the doctor suddenly told me they could not proceed unless I had my wisdom teeth extracted first. I explained that I had already paid, and he assured me he could do the extraction on the same day I came to pick up my Invisalign. He even personally walked to the front desk to let them know and have the appointment arranged.

A couple of weeks later, I arrived at 11:10 AM for my appointment, fully expecting to also have the wisdom teeth extraction done. After waiting for about 30 minutes, I went to check what the delay was. They told me the appointment would take longer than expected because they “didn’t have the room ready” and that I needed to keep waiting.

I then confirmed that I was also scheduled for wisdom teeth extraction, and they responded with, “No, we don’t have you down for that.” I was furious, especially since I had taken time out of my workday for this. There was no apology or accountability whatsoever. Instead, they made a comment implying that I wouldn’t want the doctor who was there that day to perform the extraction — which was honestly shocking and completely unprofessional.

At that point, I told them I would not be doing the extraction with them at all. I then continued waiting just to pick up my Invisalign, and they finally took me in an hour and a half later.

I truly regret getting Invisalign through this clinic and wish I had thought it through more carefully before committing. It is shocking how many incompetent people work here!

Update: I had to request a refund for the Invisalign as the doctor who was in did not know how to fit it in. All this after waiting for so long! I will provide an update on whether they issued the refund.

Update 5/31/26 - They did not issue a refund and they also charged my insurance for the cost of the procedure I did not receive. Additionally, they submitted the insurance claim for this visit even though I received zero service that day. I guess I will either have to dispute this or take legal action.
